tags.name: `mc-tag`
tags.description:
Purpose: A tag is a compact element that represents an attribute, keyword, or category. It can be used for filtering, organizing, or categorizing content.
Category: Data Display
When to use: When you need to represent a keyword or category in a compact form.
When not to use: For large blocks of text or complex data representations.
Works with components: mc-list-item, mc-tab, mc-table
Alternative component names: Label, Badge, Pill, Chip

Events:

  * `dismiss` {`CustomEvent<string>`} - Emitted when the tag is dismissed. Works only if `withaction` is set to true.

Slots:

  * ``default`` {} - The label HTML to use for the mc-tag.

  * ``icon`` {} - The custom graphic, pictogram, etc. to use as the icon for mc-tag.

  * ``trailingicon`` {} - The custom graphic, pictogram, etc. to use as the trailingicon for mc-tag.

Attributes:

  * `appearance` {TagAppearance} - Appearance of the tag.
Can be: `neutral-default`, `neutral-weak`, `neutral-inverse`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `error`

  * `width` {`Width`} - Width of the button.

  * `withaction` {`boolean`} - `true` if it should be removable and in that case the clear button appears on the tag.
Clicking on clear button will dispatch `dismiss` event.

Properties:

  * `fitToIconSize` {`FitToIconSize`} - 

  * `appearance` {TagAppearance} - Appearance of the tag.
Can be: `neutral-default`, `neutral-weak`, `neutral-inverse`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `error`

  * `width` {`Width`} - Width of the button.

  * `withaction` {`boolean`} - `true` if it should be removable and in that case the clear button appears on the tag.
Clicking on clear button will dispatch `dismiss` event.

  * `dismiss` - Click on dismiss the button

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
`appearance` {TagAppearance} - Appearance of the tag.
Can be: `neutral-default`, `neutral-weak`, `neutral-inverse`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `error`

Property: appearance

Default: neutral-weak

attributes.name: width
attributes.description:
`width` {`Width`} - Width of the button.

Property: width

Default: auto

attributes.name: withaction
attributes.description:
`withaction` {`boolean`} - `true` if it should be removable and in that case the clear button appears on the tag.
Clicking on clear button will dispatch `dismiss` event.

Property: withaction

Default: false

attributes.name: ondismiss
attributes.description: `dismiss` {`CustomEvent<string>`} - Emitted when the tag is dismissed. Works only if `withaction` is set to true.
